verification_results.folder_cleaning: Legacy suffix removal and underscore-to-dash conversion operational
verification_results.week_folders: Week-of-YYYY-MM-DD folder creation with proper Monday calculation confirmed
verification_results.manifest_updates: V3 manifests get archived status, timestamps, and status history entries

key_changes.manifest_status_fix: Changed v3 manifest status from 'ready' to 'archived' for archived meetings
key_changes.status_history_update: Status history entries now use 'archived' instead of 'ready'
